prestazioni: Engine: 1.8L 16V Turbo (Type 182, engine code 182 A4.000) - Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (83.5mm, 8.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Upgraded head studs from ARP (PN 206-4701) and ported/polished cylinder head with oversized Ferrea Racing intake (52mm) and exhaust (42mm) valves, paired with Ferrea valve springs and titanium retainers.

Turbocharger: Garrett GT2867 .82 A/R turbo (PN 743347-5002S) with TiAL Sport 38mm external wastegate (PN MV-R) and custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by Tubistyle (Italy), featuring equal-length runners and V-band connections. Intercooler upgrade to a custom front-mount unit by Bell Intercoolers (2.5" core, 600x300x76mm) with silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance (PN 16750).

Fuel & Ignition: Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump (PN 0 580 254 044) with Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump (PN F90000267), Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (PN ID1000), and AEM 340lph fuel pressure regulator (PN 50-201). Ignition system upgraded to MSD 8207 coil packs (PN 8207) with NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (PN 7164, gap set to 0.024"). Standalone ECU: Link G4+ Xtreme (PN 100-0001) with custom 2-bar MAP sensor and wideband O2 sensor (AEM 30-0300).
estetica: Body Kit: Custom "Fiat Coupe Turbo Extreme" widebody kit by Prior Design (Germany), featuring extended front fenders (30mm per side), carbon fiber side skirts, and a rear diffuser with integrated dual-exit exhaust cutouts. Front bumper modified with a custom carbon fiber splitter by Seibon Carbon (PN CF-FIAT-COUPE-SPLITTER) and canards from APR Performance (PN GT-200).

Wheels & Suspension: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Suspension upgraded to Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (PN DFV 182) with custom valving for the Fiat Coupe chassis, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (PN SPF0116-K).

Interior & Aero: Full carbon fiber interior trim by VIS Racing (dashboard, door cards, center console) with Recaro Sportster CS seats (PN 389 00 91) in Alcantara/leather (custom FIAT Coupe mounting brackets by Status Racing). Rear wing: custom carbon fiber GT-style wing by 9 Lives Racing (3-piece, 1700mm width, adjustable angle 0-15 degrees) with integrated third brake light. Engine bay dress-up with carbon fiber valve cover (Seibon PN CF-FIAT-182-VALVECOVER) and custom aluminum radiator support by Rad Rides.
